mapper.sql: recruitment_id, resource_id, publisher_user_id, event_name, direction, skill_requirement, member_limit, current_member_count, recruitment_status, deadline, close_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO team_recruitment_info ( resource_id, publisher_user_id, event_name, direction, skill_requirement, member_limit, current_member_count, recruitment_status, deadline, close_time, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{resourceId}, #{publisherUserId}, #{eventName}, #{direction}, #{skillRequirement}, #{memberLimit}, #{currentMemberCount}, #{recruitmentStatus}, #{deadline}, #{closeTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE team_recruitment_info SET resource_id = #{resourceId}, publisher_user_id = #{publisherUserId}, event_name = #{eventName}, direction = #{direction}, skill_requirement = #{skillRequirement}, member_limit = #{memberLimit}, current_member_count = #{currentMemberCount}, recruitment_status = #{recruitmentStatus}, deadline = #{deadline}, close_time = #{closeTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, deleted = #{deleted} WHERE recruitment_id = #{recruitmentId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM team_recruitment_info WHERE recruitment_id = #{recruitmentId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM team_recruitment_info WHERE deleted = 0 AND recruitment_status = #{recruitmentStatus}
mapper.update: UPDATE team_recruitment_info SET recruitment_status = 'EXPIRED', update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE deleted = 0 AND recruitment_status IN ('RECRUITING', 'FULL') AND deadline <= #{deadlineTime}

UPDATE team_recruitment_info SET current_member_count = current_member_count + 1, recruitment_status = CASE WHEN current_member_count + 1 >= member_limit THEN 'FULL' ELSE 'RECRUITING' END, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE recruitment_id = #{recruitmentId} AND deleted = 0 AND recruitment_status = 'RECRUITING' AND current_member_count < member_limit
